alerts.summary: High network activity & Unauthorized Modbus payload command overrides on Compressor Controller PLC (DEV-PLC04) from host 10.227.100.99
alerts.aiExplanation: AI models identified a burst of high frequency Modbus TCP commands targeting writable coils on register 4001, combined with a spoofed MAC header.
alerts.recommendedAction: Isolate port 502, quarantine PLC node, and verify firewall policy configurations.

alerts.summary: Unusual communication pattern: Port scanning activities flagged on Security Gateway (DEV-GW04)
alerts.aiExplanation: Sequence of TCP SYN packets scanning ports 22, 80, 443, and 502 in rapid succession (120 scans/sec).
alerts.recommendedAction: Restrict incoming packets from subnet range 10.227.102.* and check access lists.

alerts.summary: Unknown device connection attempt matching MAC 00:1A:2B:FF:EE:DD trying to query Ventilation PLC Controller
alerts.aiExplanation: MAC address filter mismatch. A non-whitelisted device attempted to negotiate Modbus session handshake.
alerts.recommendedAction: Review MAC authorization table and audit local network switches.

alerts.recommendedAction: Isolate port 502, quarantine PLC node, and verify firewall policy configurations.

alerts.summary: Unusual communication pattern: Port scanning activities flagged on Security Gateway (DEV-GW04)
alerts.aiExplanation: Sequence of TCP SYN packets scanning ports 22, 80, 443, and 502 in rapid succession (120 scans/sec).
alerts.recommendedAction: Restrict incoming packets from subnet range 10.227.102.* and check access lists.

alerts.recommendedAction: Review MAC authorization table and audit local network switches.
